user.title: HA Weather Provider
user.description: Set up The Weather Company weather data.

data_description.daily_forecast_duration: Controls how many days are requested from The Weather Company daily forecast endpoint. Longer durations provide more data, but Home Assistant and some cards may only display part of it.
data_description.enable_air_quality: Creates air quality sensors for AQ index, category, health message, primary pollutant, and pollutant details. Enable this only if your API key includes the TWC Global Air Quality endpoint.
data_description.enable_pollen: Creates pollen forecast and observation sensors for tree, grass, ragweed, mold, and report times. Enable this only if your API key includes the TWC pollen endpoints for your location.
data_description.enable_tropical_weather: Creates compact tropical weather sensors for active storm count, active storm summary, update time, and expiration time. Enable this only if your API key includes the TWC tropical current-position endpoint.
data_description.extra_entities: Creates companion sensors used by demo dashboards and custom cards. This includes current conditions, wind, pressure, UV, visibility, precipitation and snow totals, alert count, integration version, and daily forecast adapter sensors.
data_description.hourly_forecast_duration: Controls how much hourly forecast data is requested from The Weather Company. Choose the smallest duration that covers the cards or automations you plan to use.
data_description.latitude: Use decimal degrees. North is positive, south is negative.
data_description.longitude: Use decimal degrees. East is positive, west is negative.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: Controls how often Home Assistant refreshes Weather Company data. Use a longer interval if you are watching API quota usage.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to The Weather Company API.
error.not_authorized: The API key is not authorized for this Weather Company endpoint.
error.invalid_coordinates: Latitude or longitude is outside the supported range.
error.invalid_units: The selected unit system is not supported.
